config.llm.openrouter.api_key_desc:
Your OpenRouter API Key.
If you don't have one, please open https://openrouter.ai/workspaces/default/keys to create one.
config.llm.oai_compat.name_desc:
The name of your provider.
You can enter what you want but no spaces in your string.
config.llm.oai_compat.display_name_desc: The name that will display on your application. If you don't know what this is, please leave it empty.
config.llm.oai_compat.base_url_desc:
The URL used to call the API.
If you don't have one, please head to your provider and ask for it.
config.llm.oai_compat.api_key_desc:
Your API Key.
If you don't have one, please go to your provider's API Key management page and create one.
config.chat.telegram.bot_token_desc: Your Telegram Bot Token. If you don't have one, you can get it from @BotFather.
config.chat.telegram.collapse_length_des: The message length threshold above which the message will be collapsed into an expandable quote.
config.chat.telegram.reaction_status_des:
Emoji reaction notification preference.
- enabled: an emoji reaction is added to your message while processing.
- clean: the reaction is removed after the model finishes processing.
- disabled: no emoji reaction.
config.hachimi.gguf.model_type_desc: If you are using safeguard models, please select 'safeguard'. Otherwise, leave it as is.
config.hachimi.gguf.context_length_desc: How much context Hachimi can process. If your available RAM is low, choose a smaller value. A larger context allows longer messages. If you are unsure, leave it as is.
config.tool.file.write_mode_desc: File access mode. 'readonly' blocks writes and deletes; 'readwrite' allows them inside the workspace.
config.tool.browser.mode_desc: Browser launch mode. Use 'headless' for servers; use 'headful' only when a desktop UI is available.
config.hachimi.gguf.setup_prompt:
Do you want to enter model details manually?

If you are unsure, please select 'No'.
config.hachimi.gguf.setup_question: Do you want to enter model details manually?
config.hachimi.gguf.url_help: Please enter a valid URL to download the GGUF file.
config.hachimi.gguf.sha256_help: Please enter a valid SHA256 hash. If you are unsure, leave it empty.
config.llm.oai_compat.credential_error: Oops! We can't get information based on your credentials!
config.llm.oai_compat.credential_error_m: We strongly recommend you check your Internet connection and credentials. If you have a poor connection or believe your credentials are correct, press Enter to add models manually. Otherwise, press Ctrl+C to exit.
config.llm.oai_compat.model_select_help: Please select models available from your API. You can change defaults later by running `manboster config`.
